channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Nathy Peluso Earns First No. 1 on Latin Airplay Chart With Marc Anthony Collab
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to this week's Latin music update. We've got some exciting news to share, straight from the Billboard charts.
[Music transitions to a Latin beat]
Host: Marc Anthony and Nathy Peluso are celebrating a big win, as their collaboration "Como En El Idilio" takes the top spot on the Latin Airplay chart. This marks Nathy's first-ever number one, and Marc's 16th career chart-topper. The song has been climbing steadily since its debut in February and has shown a significant 20% growth in audience impressions.
[Music clip of "Como En El Idilio" plays]
Host: With 16 number ones under his belt, Marc ties with Carlos Vives for the third-most chart-toppers among tropical soloists. And for Nathy, this is not only her first number one, but also her first charting partnership to reach the top spot. The song is also performing well on other charts, including the Hot Latin Songs and Hot Tropical Songs charts.
[Music transitions to a new segment]
Host: Meanwhile, on the Regional Mexican Airplay chart, Luis Angel 'El Flaco' has scored his third number one with his latest single "Directo al Corazón". The song jumped from number four to number one, with a 16% boost in impressions. This makes him the third soloist to reach the top spot on this chart in 2026.
[Music clip of "Directo al Corazón" plays]
Host: That's all for this week's update. You can catch all the latest chart news and updates on Billboard.com, and follow us on social media @billboard and @billboardcharts. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll see you next time.
[Outro music plays]
